description: Codex CLI - AI-powered coding assistant by OpenAI.

root.name: app
tip: Launch the Codex desktop app (opens the app installer if missing).

root.name: app-server
tip: [experimental] Run the app server or related tooling.

option.name: --analytics-default-enabled
tip: Controls whether analytics are enabled by default.

option.name: --listen
tip: U: --listen <URL>
Transport endpoint URL.
Supported values: stdio:// (default), unix://, unix://PATH, ws://IP:PORT, off

option.name: --stdio
tip: Use stdio as the transport (equivalent to --listen stdio://).

option.name: --ws-audience
tip: U: --ws-audience <AUDIENCE>
Expected audience for signed JWT bearer tokens.

option.name: --ws-auth
tip: U: --ws-auth <MODE>
Websocket auth mode for non-loopback listeners.
Possible values: capability-token, signed-bearer-token

next.name: capability-token
tip: Use capability token authentication.

next.name: signed-bearer-token
tip: Use signed bearer token authentication.

option.name: --ws-issuer
tip: U: --ws-issuer <ISSUER>
Expected issuer for signed JWT bearer tokens.

option.name: --ws-max-clock-skew-seconds
tip: U: --ws-max-clock-skew-seconds <SECONDS>
Maximum clock skew when validating signed JWT bearer tokens.

option.name: --ws-shared-secret-file
tip: U: --ws-shared-secret-file <PATH>
Absolute path to the shared secret file for signed JWT bearer tokens.

option.name: --ws-token-file
tip: U: --ws-token-file <PATH>
Absolute path to the capability-token file.

option.name: --ws-token-sha256
tip: U: --ws-token-sha256 <HEX>
Hex-encoded SHA-256 digest of the capability token.

next.name: daemon
tip: Manage the local app-server daemon.

next.name: bootstrap
tip: Install durable local app-server management for SSH-driven use.

next.name: disable-remote-control
tip: Disable remote control for future starts and a currently running managed daemon.

next.name: enable-remote-control
tip: Enable remote control for future starts and a currently running managed daemon.

next.name: restart
tip: Restart the local app server daemon.

next.name: start
tip: Start the local app server daemon if it is not already running.

next.name: stop
tip: Stop the local app server daemon.

next.name: version
tip: Print local CLI and running app-server versions as JSON.

next.name: generate-json-schema
tip: [experimental] Generate JSON Schema for the app server protocol.

next.name: generate-ts
tip: [experimental] Generate TypeScript bindings for the app server protocol.

next.name: proxy
tip: Proxy stdio bytes to the running app-server control socket.

root.name: apply
tip: Apply the latest diff produced by Codex agent as a git apply to your local working tree.

root.name: archive
tip: Archive a saved session by id or session name.

root.name: cloud
tip: [EXPERIMENTAL] Browse tasks from Codex Cloud and apply changes locally.

next.name: apply
tip: Apply the diff for a Codex Cloud task locally.

next.name: diff
tip: Show the unified diff for a Codex Cloud task.

next.name: exec
tip: Submit a new Codex Cloud task without launching the TUI.

option.name: --attempts
tip: U: --attempts <ATTEMPTS>
Number of assistant attempts (best-of-N).
Default: 1

option.name: --branch
tip: U: --branch <BRANCH>
Git branch to run in Codex Cloud (defaults to current branch).

option.name: --env
tip: U: --env <ENV_ID>
Target environment identifier.

next.name: list
tip: List Codex Cloud tasks.

next.name: status
tip: Show the status of a Codex Cloud task.

root.name: completion
tip: Generate shell completion scripts.

root.name: debug
tip: Debugging tools.

next.name: app-server
tip: Tooling: helps debug the app server.

next.name: models
tip: Render the raw model catalog as JSON.

next.name: prompt-input
tip: Render the model-visible prompt input list as JSON.

root.name: delete
tip: Permanently delete a saved session by id or session name.

root.name: doctor
tip: Diagnose local Codex installation, config, auth, and runtime health.

option.name: --all
tip: Expand long lists in detailed human output.

option.name: --ascii
tip: Use ASCII status labels and separators in human output.

option.name: --json
tip: Emit a redacted machine-readable report.

option.name: --no-color
tip: Disable ANSI color in human output.

option.name: --summary
tip: Only show grouped check rows and the final count summary.

root.name: exec
tip: Run Codex non-interactively.

option.name: --color
tip: U: --color <COLOR>
Specifies color settings for use in the output.
Possible values: always, never, auto

next.name: always
tip: Always use color output.

next.name: auto
tip: Automatically detect color support.

next.name: never
tip: Never use color output.

option.name: --ephemeral
tip: Run without persisting session files to disk.

option.name: --ignore-rules
tip: Do not load user or project execpolicy .rules files.

option.name: --ignore-user-config
tip: Do not load $CODEX_HOME/config.toml; auth still uses CODEX_HOME.

option.name: --json
tip: Print events to stdout as JSONL.

option.name: --output-last-message
tip: U: -o, --output-last-message <FILE>
Specifies file where the last message from the agent should be written.

option.name: --output-schema
tip: U: --output-schema <FILE>
Path to a JSON Schema file describing the model's final response shape.

option.name: --skip-git-repo-check
tip: Allow running Codex outside a Git repository.

root.name: exec-server
tip: [EXPERIMENTAL] Run the standalone exec-server service.

option.name: --environment-id
tip: U: --environment-id <ID>
Environment id to attach to when registering remotely.

option.name: --listen
tip: U: --listen <URL>
Transport endpoint URL.
Supported values: ws://IP:PORT (default), stdio, stdio://

option.name: --name
tip: U: --name <NAME>
Human-readable environment name.

option.name: --remote
tip: U: --remote <URL>
Register this exec-server as a remote environment using the given base URL.

option.name: --use-agent-identity-auth
tip: Use Agent Identity auth from CODEX_ACCESS_TOKEN for remote registration.

root.name: features
tip: Inspect feature flags.

next.name: disable
tip: Disable a feature in config.toml.

next.name: enable
tip: Enable a feature in config.toml.

next.name: list
tip: List known features with their stage and effective state.

root.name: fork
tip: Fork a previous interactive session (picker by default; use --last to fork the most recent).

option.name: --last
tip: Fork the most recent session without the picker.

root.name: help
tip: Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s).

root.name: login
tip: Manage login.

option.name: --device-auth
tip: Use device authentication flow.

option.name: --with-access-token
tip: Read the access token from stdin.
E: printenv CODEX_ACCESS_TOKEN | codex login --with-access-token

option.name: --with-api-key
tip: Read the API key from stdin.
E: printenv OPENAI_API_KEY | codex login --with-api-key

next.name: status
tip: Show login status.

root.name: logout
tip: Remove stored authentication credentials.

root.name: mcp
tip: Manage external MCP servers for Codex.

next.name: add
tip: Add a new MCP server.

next.name: get
tip: Get details of an MCP server.

next.name: list
tip: List configured MCP servers.

next.name: login
tip: Login to an MCP server.

next.name: logout
tip: Logout from an MCP server.

next.name: remove
tip: Remove an MCP server.

root.name: mcp-server
tip: Start Codex as an MCP server (stdio).

root.name: plugin
tip: Manage Codex plugins.

next.name: add
tip: Install a plugin from a configured marketplace snapshot.

next.name: list
tip: List plugins available from configured marketplace snapshots.

next.name: marketplace
tip: Add, list, upgrade, or remove configured plugin marketplaces.

next.name: add
tip: Add a local or Git marketplace to the configured marketplace sources.

next.name: list
tip: List plugin marketplaces Codex is currently considering and their roots.

next.name: remove
tip: Remove a configured marketplace source by name.

next.name: upgrade
tip: Refresh configured Git marketplace snapshots.

next.name: remove
tip: Remove an installed plugin from local config and cache.

root.name: remote-control
tip: [experimental] Manage the app-server daemon with remote control enabled.

option.name: --json
tip: Emit machine-readable JSON.

next.name: start
tip: Start the app-server daemon with remote control enabled.

next.name: stop
tip: Stop the app-server daemon.

root.name: resume
tip: Resume a previous interactive session (picker by default; use --last to continue the most recent).

option.name: --last
tip: Resume the most recent session without the picker.

root.name: review
tip: Run a code review non-interactively.

root.name: sandbox
tip: Run commands within a Codex-provided sandbox.

option.name: --include-managed-config
tip: Include managed requirements while resolving an explicit permissions profile.

option.name: --permissions-profile
tip: U: -P, --permissions-profile <NAME>
Named permissions profile to apply from the active configuration stack.

root.name: unarchive
tip: Unarchive a saved session by id or session name.

root.name: update
tip: Update Codex to the latest version.

option.name: --add-dir
tip: U: --add-dir <DIR>
Additional directories that should be writable alongside the primary workspace.

option.name: --ask-for-approval
tip: U: -a, --ask-for-approval <APPROVAL_POLICY>
Configure when the model requires human approval before executing a command.
Possible values: untrusted, on-failure, on-request, never

next.name: never
tip: Never ask for user approval.

next.name: on-failure
tip: DEPRECATED: Run all commands without asking for user approval.

next.name: on-request
tip: The model decides when to ask the user for approval.

next.name: untrusted
tip: Only run trusted commands without asking for user approval.

option.name: --cd
tip: U: -C, --cd <DIR>
Tell the agent to use the specified directory as its working root.

option.name: --config
tip: U: -c, --config <key=value>
Override a configuration value that would otherwise be loaded from ~/.codex/config.toml.
Use a dotted path (foo.bar.baz) to override nested values.
The value portion is parsed as TOML.
E: -c model="o3"
E: -c 'sandbox_permissions=["disk-full-read-access"]'

option.name: --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox
tip: Skip all confirmation prompts and execute commands without sandboxing.
EXTREMELY DANGEROUS. Intended solely for running in environments that are externally sandboxed.

option.name: --dangerously-bypass-hook-trust
tip: Run enabled hooks without requiring persisted hook trust for this invocation.
DANGEROUS. Intended only for automation that already vets hook sources.

option.name: --disable
tip: U: --disable <FEATURE>
Disable a feature (repeatable).
Equivalent to -c features.<name>=false

option.name: --enable
tip: U: --enable <FEATURE>
Enable a feature (repeatable).
Equivalent to -c features.<name>=true

option.name: --image
tip: U: -i, --image <FILE>
Optional image(s) to attach to the initial prompt.

option.name: --local-provider
tip: U: --local-provider <OSS_PROVIDER>
Specify which local provider to use (lmstudio or ollama).
If not specified with --oss, will use config default or show selection.

next.name: lmstudio
tip: Use LM Studio as the local provider.

next.name: ollama
tip: Use Ollama as the local provider.

option.name: --model
tip: U: -m, --model <MODEL>
Model the agent should use.

option.name: --no-alt-screen
tip: Disable alternate screen mode.
Runs the TUI in inline mode, preserving terminal scrollback history.

option.name: --oss
tip: Use open-source provider.

option.name: --profile
tip: U: -p, --profile <CONFIG_PROFILE_V2>
Layer $CODEX_HOME/<name>.config.toml on top of the base user config.

option.name: --remote
tip: U: --remote <ADDR>
Connect the TUI to a remote app server endpoint.
Accepted forms: ws://host:port, wss://host:port, unix://, or unix://PATH.

option.name: --remote-auth-token-env
tip: U: --remote-auth-token-env <ENV_VAR>
Name of the environment variable containing the bearer token to send to a remote app server websocket.

option.name: --sandbox
tip: U: -s, --sandbox <SANDBOX_MODE>
Select the sandbox policy to use when executing model-generated shell commands.
Possible values: read-only, workspace-write, danger-full-access

next.name: danger-full-access
tip: Sandbox allows full access (dangerous).

next.name: read-only
tip: Sandbox allows read-only access.

next.name: workspace-write
tip: Sandbox allows write access to workspace.

option.name: --search
tip: Enable live web search.
When enabled, the native Responses web_search tool is available to the model.

option.name: --strict-config
tip: Error out when config.toml contains fields that are not recognized by this version of Codex.

option.name: --version
tip: U: -V, --version
Print version.

common_option.name: --config
tip: U: -c, --config <key=value>
Override a configuration value from ~/.codex/config.toml.

common_option.name: --disable
tip: U: --disable <FEATURE>
Disable a feature.

common_option.name: --enable
tip: U: --enable <FEATURE>
Enable a feature.

common_option.name: --help
tip: U: -h, --help
Print help.
